name: Tunisia Winter Open Day 2017

venue.name: Hotel Marhaba Palace Sousse
venue.details: Look for the conference room inside the hotel

information:
Tunisia Winter Open 2017 is open for participants from all countries, everyone is welcome.
Competition fee is 20DT per participant
Medals and Gifts will be awarded to the winners in each category.
It should be known that only competitors who do check-in into the hotel can benefit from the lunch.
